questionHtml:
Which structures are part of the walls of both capillaries and veins?

I. Cells

II. Pores

III. Elastic fibres

A. I only

B. I and II

C. I and III

D. I, II and III

meta.title: Which structures are part of the walls of both capillaries and veins? I. Cells II. Pores III. Elastic fibres A. I only B. I and II C. I and III D. I, II and III
breadcrumbLabels: B3.2.1. Adaptations of capillaries for exchange of materials between blood and the internal or external environment
B3.2.5. Adaptations of veins for the return of blood to the heart
